overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit urban environment in Night City's Japantown district. The player moves from covered walkways through narrow neon alleys with Japanese signage, then emerges to view towering skyscrapers in a dense cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with metal slat walls

events.description: dialogue interface for Wakako Okada appears on screen
approaching corner turn into narrower passage

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway with metal slat walls on the left, passing vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance

entered.detail: vertical metal slats allowing diffused light through
glowing teal circular sign mounted on concrete pillar
large structural support column with attached lighting

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered pedestrian walkway characterized by metal slat walls on the left that filter the outside light. The corridor is lit by artificial lights and neon signs, with a few pedestrians visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alley with Japanese signage and red lanterns

events.description: turns right into narrow alley with dense neon signage and hanging lanterns
lighting shifts to vibrant pink and teal neon from multiple business signs

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley passing various neon signs and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the TENGU sign looking at the player

entered.detail: large pink neon sign with Japanese characters and 'TENGU' text
pink neon sign with stylized monkey logo
red Chinese lanterns hanging overhead in a line along the alley
large yellow industrial dumpster with black markings

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a narrow, enclosed alleyway densely packed with vibrant neon signage including the prominent TENGU and SPUNKY MONKEY signs. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere with mixed pink and teal lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open plaza

events.description: exits narrow alley back into wider covered walkway
approaching open area with natural light visible at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor toward open area with increasing pedestrian activity ahead

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead toward the open plaza

entered.detail: illuminated vertical screen displaying character advertisement
bright opening at end of walkway showing buildings and sky beyond

segments.scene_description: The player exits the narrow alley back into a wider covered walkway, approaching a bright opening that reveals an open plaza area ahead. More pedestrians are visible walking in the same direction toward the natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon between mega-skyscrapers with dramatic vertical views

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers rising above
bright sky visible between towering buildings creating dramatic backlight and sun glare

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the massive skyscrapers towering overhead in the urban canyon

entered.detail: massive futuristic tower with intricate facade details stretching vertically
elevated walkway or bridge structure connecting buildings high above

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into an open urban canyon between massive skyscrapers and tilts the camera upward to gaze at the towering buildings overhead. The lighting shifts dramatically as the bright sky becomes visible between the structures, creating a silhouette effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with panoramic city views and descending stairs

events.description: camera returns to level and continues walking along elevated path
approaching and descending stairs to lower level of the city

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway and descending stairs while observing the sprawling cityscape below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian leaning on railing looking out at the city view

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
view of lower city levels, streets, and buildings visible below the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player continues along an elevated walkway with panoramic views of the cyberpunk cityscape, passing massive digital billboards. The path begins to descend via stairs, revealing lower levels of the city while a pedestrian observes the view from the railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic, neon-lit corridors of a commercial district into the vast, open scale of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway where light filters through metal slat walls, moving forward past distant pedestrians before turning into a narrow, enclosed alleyway. As the camera pushes through this dense corridor of red paper lanterns and vibrant TENGU and SPUNKY MONKEY signage, the pink and teal lighting shifts back toward a wider walkway that leads toward a bright opening. The scene then expands as the player emerges into an open plaza, tilting the camera upward to gaze at towering skyscrapers that silhouette against the bright sky. Finally, the movement continues along an elevated path past massive digital billboards before descending a set of stairs to reveal the sprawling lower levels of the cityscape.
